nodes.name: coding-style.md
nodes.summary: Kotlin coding style guidelines covering formatting, immutability, naming conventions, null safety, sealed types, extension functions, scope functions, and error handling for ECC-guided Kotlin development.

nodes.name: hooks.md
nodes.summary: Defines PostToolUse hook behavior rules specific to Kotlin projects, guiding automated post-edit actions within the ECC harness for Kotlin codebases.

nodes.name: patterns.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive Kotlin architecture pattern guide covering dependency injection, ViewModel, Repository, UseCase, Kotlin Multiplatform (KMP) expect/actual, coroutines, and DSL builder patterns with code examples.

nodes.name: security.md
nodes.summary: Kotlin security guidelines covering secrets management, network security, input validation, data protection, authentication, ProGuard/R8 obfuscation, and WebView security for Android and KMP projects.

nodes.name: testing.md
nodes.summary: Kotlin testing standards covering JUnit5/Kotest setup, ViewModel testing with Turbine, fakes over mocks philosophy, coroutine testing, Ktor MockEngine, Room/SQLDelight testing, test naming conventions, and test organization.
